sentences.arabic: يُرِيدُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ الْيَوْمَ أَنْ يُصْبِحُوا صُنَّاعَ مُحْتَوَى مَشْهُورِينَ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi ljudi danas žele postati poznati kreatori sadržaja.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people today want to become famous content creators.

sentences.arabic: يُنْتِجُونَ مَقَاطِعَ فِيدْيُو تَعْلِيمِيَّةً أَوْ تَرْفِيهِيَّةً لِمُتَابِعِيهِمْ عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِت.
sentences.translation: Oni proizvode edukativne ili zabavne video snimke za svoje pratioce na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: They produce educational or entertaining videos for their followers on the internet.

sentences.arabic: الْمُحْتَوَى النَّاجِحُ يَتَطَلَّبُ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْعَمَلِ الشَّاقِّ وَالْإِبْدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Uspješan sadržaj zahtijeva mnogo napornog rada i kreativnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Successful content requires a lot of hard work and creativity.
